name: Zucchini Brown Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dice the zucchini.
2. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the diced zucchini and garlic, then sauté until the zucchini is tender but not browned.
3. Remove the zucchini with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Add the rice to the same pan and stir to coat with any remaining oil.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and white wine, adding the bay leaf and dried basil.
6. Stir in the salt.
7. Return the sautéed zucchini to the pan.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
9. Simmer until the rice is tender, about 20 minutes.
10. Serve and enjoy your meal. Makes 6 servings.
